name: Logozzo's Chocolate Truffles
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces Semisweet chocolate (cut into small pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, bring heavy cream and unsalted butter to a boil.
2. Remove from heat and add the chopped semisweet chocolate. Allow it to sit for 5 minutes.
3. Stir until smooth and let cool in the refrigerator.
4. Stir with a whisk every 15 minutes or so until very thick.
5. Chill until firm.
6. Using a melon baller or small spoon, scoop out tablespoon-sized portions of the mixture.
7. Place each portion on a sheet sprinkled with cocoa powder.
8. Place in the refrigerator to harden.
9. Gently roll each hardened portion of chocolate into a ball using your palms.
10. Chill again to firm up.
11. Roll each truffle in powdered cocoa, finely chopped nuts, or dip into melted chocolate.
12. Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator.
13. Makes about 3 dozen truffles.
